elections.note: Certified final 284,625 ballots cast is solid (CA SoS 2010 Statement of Vote, 'Voter Participation Statistics by County' table, San Francisco 'Total' = 284,625; the standalone participation PDF 403s so the figure is read from the complete-sov.pdf, p. ~189). SF uses neighborhood polling places with PAPER rosters and MANUAL signature verification, so e-pollbooks and ASV were never adopted (vs both = n/a). Election-night numerator (the ~8pm first post-close report = pre-Election-Day vote-by-mail batch) is NOT sourceable: no Wayback/Archive-It snapshot of an SF 2010 results page exists in this environment, and SF DOE did not retain per-report summary files for 2010. Null, not a substituted denominator.

Certified final 364,875 ballots cast is solid (CA SoS 2012 SOV 'Voter Participation Statistics by County', San Francisco 'Total' = 364,875). E-pollbooks and ASV never adopted (vs both = n/a). The ~8pm first-report (pre-Election-Day VBM) is NOT sourceable: the earliest archived capture of sfelections.org/results/20121106/ is 2012-11-12 02:00 UTC (~Nov 11 6pm PT, 5 days post-election), which renders a CANVASS cumulative of 325,298 (VBM 174,755 / ED 150,543) — VBM had grown far beyond the election-night batch by then, so it cannot stand in for the 8pm first report. No election-night (Nov 6 evening / Nov 7) snapshot exists on web.archive.org or Archive-It. Null, not a substituted denominator.

Certified final 231,214 ballots cast is solid (CA SoS 2014 SOV 'Voter Participation Statistics by County', San Francisco 'Total' = 231,214). E-pollbooks and ASV never adopted (vs both = n/a). SECONDARY estimate of the first report = 77,009. SF DOE's announced 2014 reporting schedule: the first preliminary report (~8:45pm) is the vote-by-mail ballots received before Election Day; from ~9:45pm reports add polling-place (Election-Day) ballots. No live ~8pm snapshot was archived — the earliest Wayback capture is 2014-11-05 18:20 UTC (10:20am PT, the morning after), which already shows 597/597 precincts (100%, i.e. end of election night): VBM 77,009 + Election Day 85,530 = 162,539 total. In SF DOE's per-report data for 2016/2018/2022/2024 the entire VBM batch is released in report #1 (~8pm, Election-Day = 0) and the VBM column then stays FLAT through election night while only Election-Day ballots accumulate; applying that identical pattern, the end-of-night VBM column (77,009) equals the ~8:45pm first-report batch. 77,009/231,214 = 33.3%. Secondary (not a direct 8pm capture; relies on the flat-VBM reporting pattern).

Certified final 414,528 ballots cast (CA SoS 2016 SOV 'Voter Participation Statistics by County', San Francisco 'Total' = 414,528). E-pollbooks and ASV never adopted (vs both = n/a). First post-close report = report #1, timestamped 2016-11-08 20:02 PT: 'VBM Reporting Turnout' TOTAL = 142,307, 'Election Day Reporting Turnout' = 0 — the pre-Election-Day vote-by-mail batch released right after polls closed. 142,307/414,528 = 34.3%. Primary (official SF DOE per-report summary file).

Certified final 372,848 ballots cast (CA SoS 2018 SOV 'Voter Participation Statistics by County', San Francisco 'Total' = 372,848). E-pollbooks and ASV never adopted (vs both = n/a). First post-close report = report #1, timestamped 2018-11-06 20:51 PT: VBM-only = 118,806, Election Day = 0 (pre-Election-Day vote-by-mail batch). 118,806/372,848 = 31.9%. Primary (official SF DOE per-report summary file).

Certified final 310,071 ballots cast (CA SoS 2022 SOV 'Voter Participation Statistics by County', San Francisco 'Total' = 310,071). E-pollbooks and ASV never adopted (vs both = n/a). First post-close report = report #1, timestamped 2022-11-08 20:42 PT: VBM-only = 132,296, Election Day = 0 (pre-Election-Day vote-by-mail batch). 132,296/310,071 = 42.7%. Primary (official SF DOE per-report summary file).

Certified final 412,231 ballots cast (CA SoS 2024 SOV 'Voter Participation Statistics by County', San Francisco 'Total' = 412,231). E-pollbooks and ASV never adopted (vs both = n/a). First post-close report = report #1, timestamped 2024-11-05 20:41 PT: VBM-only = 197,108, Election Day = 0 (pre-Election-Day vote-by-mail batch). 197,108/412,231 = 47.8%. Primary (official SF DOE per-report summary file).
